backend/main.mo: Defines actor with user profiles, messages, mood categories, reassurance templates, and access control, initializing template lists and session storage.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping features to related frontend files, components, test IDs, and confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries describing functionality and design details of various frontend React components and sections.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles defining light/dark theme CSS variables and applying global background, text, and border rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry file setting up metadata, SEO tags, JSON-LD schema, and loading the React bundle root.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React app wrapper providing error boundaries, suspense fallback, local auth context, and global toaster notifications.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthCrypto.ts: Implements PBKDF2-based password verifier generation, verification, and AES-GCM encryption key derivation utilities.
frontend/src/auth/localAuthStore.ts: IndexedDB-backed store managing local accounts and sessions with CRUD operations for authentication data.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalAuthSc: Login/signup UI with username, password, CAPTCHA, and error handling using local auth hooks.
frontend/src/components/auth/LocalCaptch: Simple math‑based CAPTCHA component supporting regeneration and verification callbacks.
frontend/src/components/experience/Anony: Encrypted anonymous chat panel that decrypts history, encrypts outgoing messages, classifies mood, and triggers insights.
frontend/src/components/experience/DataE: Form for submitting key/value entries with mood classification and temporary insight display, plus entry listing.
frontend/src/components/experience/Exper: Authentication gateway letting users choose local auth or Internet Identity before entering the experience.
Layout wrapper applying transitions and a styled container around experience content.
Main authenticated experience view with tabs for anonymous chat and therapist inbox, logout handling, and auth gating.
frontend/src/components/experience/MoodI: Displays a mood insight alert with an icon, gradient label, and reassurance message based on the detected mood category.
frontend/src/components/experience/Sessi: Provides a form for users to submit a therapy session request with a message and detected mood category.
frontend/src/components/experience/Thera: Shows a therapist inbox listing session requests with metadata, loading states, and formatted timestamps.
Modal prompting users to connect with a therapist and optionally submit a session request form.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Renders the app footer with copyright info and a referral link to caffeine.ai.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomInVie: Wraps content with a zoom‑in animation when it enters the viewport, respecting reduced‑motion settings.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomPageT: Handles animated zoom transitions between landing and experience views with motion‑reduction support.
frontend/src/components/motion/ZoomTrans: Applies a delayed zoom‑in animation to children, falling back to simple fade for reduced‑motion users.
frontend/src/components/navigation/GoBac: A back‑navigation button that triggers a callback or browser history navigation.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Butto: Customizable button component with primary/secondary variants, size options, and zoom transition effects.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Callo: Stylized callout block displaying highlighted text with a quote icon.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Conve: Displays a sample user–AI message exchange with optional entrance animation.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Glass: A styled glass-like div component with hover/zoom transitions and forwarded ref.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Progr: Renders a horizontal step indicator with motion-aware width and color changes.
frontend/src/components/primitives/Secti: A layout wrapper for page sections with optional heading elements and spacing.
frontend/src/components/sections/CoreEmo: A scroll-animated section presenting a core emotional question and brief supporting text.
frontend/src/components/sections/Corpora: Animated section explaining corporate burnout and anonymity benefits, including a callout stat.
frontend/src/components/sections/FAQSect: FAQ section using an accordion to display common questions and detailed answers.
frontend/src/components/sections/Feature: Grid of feature cards with icons, animations, and brief descriptions of platform capabilities.
frontend/src/components/sections/FinalCT: Final call‑to‑action section with animated background and buttons for starting or viewing plans.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section with animated gradients, particles, and buttons to start anonymously or scroll down.
frontend/src/components/sections/HowItWo: Three‑step interactive walkthrough with step cards, progress indicator, and conversation previews.
frontend/src/components/sections/Privacy: Section highlighting key privacy principles and displaying a trust badge.
frontend/src/components/system/AccessDen: Displays an access denied message with an optional back button for unauthorized users.
frontend/src/components/system/ErrorBoun: Catches render errors and shows a retry UI, resetting state on retry.
frontend/src/components/visual/NeuralPar: Renders an animated particle network on a canvas unless reduced-motion is preferred.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor tied to Internet Identity, refetching dependent queries on change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, handling login, stored sessions, and identity state.
frontend/src/hooks/useLocalAuth.tsx: Implements local username/password authentication with session handling, password policy checks, and encryption key setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for messages, encrypted messages, data entries, templates, and session requests using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Defines global Tailwind layers, theme color variables for light/dark modes, base typography, and component styling utilities.
frontend/src/lib/classifier/moodBurnoutR: Provides keyword‑based mood and burnout classification functions and utilities for mood ratings and structured entries.
frontend/src/lib/crypto/e2ee.ts: Implements AES‑GCM encryption/decryption helpers plus serialization and parsing utilities for encrypted messages.
frontend/src/lib/moodInsight.ts: Generates mood insight objects using templates or fallbacks and maps mood categories to display labels.
frontend/src/lib/moodPresets.ts: Contains fallback reassurance templates and helpers for selecting templates and mapping mood categories to labels and colors.
frontend/src/lib/motion.ts: Defines animation constants and helper functions for transitions and zoom effects used across the UI.
frontend/src/lib/security/passwordPolicy: Validates password complexity, checks password rotation requirements, and provides requirement text helpers.
frontend/src/lib/useInView.ts: React hook that tracks when an element enters the viewport using IntersectionObserver with reduced‑motion handling.
frontend/src/lib/usePrefersReducedMotion: React hook that detects user preference for reduced motion and updates dynamically via media queries.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app, wrapping it in React Query and Internet Identity providers and loading global styles.
Page component managing transitions between landing, experience, and subscription views with animated sections and history support.
frontend/src/pages/SubscriptionPlansPage: React page rendering subscription pricing plans with a free first-session alert and styled plan cards.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL and session-based parameters, including hash routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending theme colors, animations, and utilities with plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing feature requirements for updating footer text and adding a Subscription Plans page.
